blocks.en: Wi-Fi has siblings. The IEEE 802 family is a set of related networking standards, each owning a slice of the local-network world. Knowing the map helps you place any term you meet.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 有许多“兄弟姐妹”。IEEE 802 家族是一组相关的组网标准，各自负责局域网世界的一块。掌握这张地图，能帮你给遇到的任何术语定位。

blocks.en:
mindmap
  root((IEEE 802))
    802.11 Wi-Fi
    802.1 Bridging / TSN
    802.15 PAN
      Bluetooth-class
      Zigbee
    802.19 Coexistence
blocks.zh:
mindmap
  root((IEEE 802))
    802.11 Wi-Fi
    802.1 桥接 / TSN
    802.15 PAN 个域网
      蓝牙类
      Zigbee
    802.19 共存

blocks.en: 802.11 (Wi-Fi) is the wireless LAN: medium-range, high-throughput links to an access point. It is the spine of this course.
blocks.zh: 802.11（Wi-Fi）是无线局域网：到接入点的中等距离、高吞吐链路。它是本课程的主线。

blocks.en: 802.1 is the bridging and Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) family: how networks are switched together, how VLANs separate traffic, and how clocks are synchronised for traffic that must arrive on time. 802.15 covers personal-area networks — short-range links like Bluetooth-class radios and Zigbee. 802.19 referees coexistence when different technologies share the same unlicensed spectrum.
blocks.zh: 802.1 是桥接与时间敏感网络（TSN）家族：网络如何被交换互连、VLAN 如何隔离流量，以及为必须准时到达的流量做时钟同步。802.15 覆盖个域网——蓝牙类无线电、Zigbee 等短距链路。802.19 则在不同技术共享同一免许可频谱时充当“共存裁判”。

blocks.en: This course's spine is 802.11. The other tracks — 802.1, 802.15, 802.19 — are Wi-Fi's neighbours and get their own tracks later. You don't need them to understand Wi-Fi, but they explain how Wi-Fi fits into a larger network.
blocks.zh: 本课程的主线是 802.11。其他轨道——802.1、802.15、802.19——是 Wi-Fi 的邻居，稍后各自成轨。理解 Wi-Fi 并不需要它们，但它们能说明 Wi-Fi 如何嵌入更大的网络。

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802 itself is the overview-and-architecture document: it defines the LAN/MAN reference model and how the individual 802.x standards relate to each other.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802 本身是“概述与体系结构”文档：它定义了 LAN/MAN 参考模型，以及各个 802.x 标准之间的关系。
